summary: Detailed line-by-line source-target comparison performed. E.Y. header properly localized. All dialogue and narrative translated accurately. Key characters (Harry, Draco, Snape, Hermione) properly rendered. Word count ratio 1.294 (4,471 EN words to 5,785 VI words) consistent with normal EN→VI expansion. No omission, mistranslation, untranslated English, MT artifacts, or terminology issues found.
